The '''''Distant Rainbow''''', a modified [[Kuat Drive Yards/Legends|Kuat Drive Yards]] [[Starwind-class pleasure yacht|''Starwind''-class pleasure yacht]], was the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of of the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] chief [[Mazzic]]. Mazzic bought the ship at a bargain price from a retired [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] smuggler. It was armed with two [[Quad laser cannon/Legends|quad laser cannons]], mounted on the top and bottom of the ship, and was one of the most luxurious smuggling vessels in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. However, it was very cramped when fully loaded, and could carry a mere two tons of cargo.

{{Ship-stub}}
